mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pg_query_stat_history (instance_id, database_name, user_name, query_id, query_text, delta_calls, delta_exec_time_ms, delta_rows, metrics, stats_reset, deallocations, collect_time) VALUES
(#{instanceId}, #{it.databaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.queryId}, #{it.queryText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.deltaCalls}, #{it.deltaExecTimeMs}, #{it.deltaRows}, CAST(#{it.metricsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{it.statsReset,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS timestamptz), #{it.deallocations}, to_timestamp(#{it.timestampMillis} / 1000.0))
